evals.prompt: Run a full codebase analysis with validation on the current project. Check for CSS issues, performance problems, and code quality concerns.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs `./scripts/analyze-codebase.sh --validate`, parses the output for issues found, categorizes them by severity (CSS, performance, code quality), and provides a summary report.
assertions: The agent runs the analyze-codebase.sh script with --validate flag
The agent parses the output for categorized issues
The agent provides a summary with issue counts by category

evals.prompt: A screenshot shows a visual regression: the gist card shadows look wrong after a CSS change. Diagnose and fix the issue.
evals.expected_output: The agent examines CSS shadow tokens, checks for hardcoded shadow values vs token usage, identifies the source of the visual regression, and applies a fix that uses the token system correctly.
assertions: The agent examines shadow-related CSS rules
The agent checks both token-generated and hardcoded shadow values
The agent identifies the root cause of the visual regression
The agent applies a fix that uses the token system

evals.prompt: The CI pipeline shows a new lint error about `noUnusedVariables`. Find and fix all unused variable violations in the codebase.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the linter to discover all unused variable violations, reads each affected file, removes or prefixes unused variables, and re-runs the linter to confirm zero violations.
assertions: The agent runs the linter to find violations
The agent reads affected files and removes unused variables
The agent re-runs the linter to confirm zero violations

evals.prompt: Our IndexedDB schema has evolved and there may be orphaned records from old migrations. Scan the db.ts service for potential issues and recommend fixes.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the db.ts service, checks schema version handling, verifies migration paths, identifies any potential orphaned data patterns, and recommends fixes with code examples.
assertions: The agent reads db.ts for schema migration logic
The agent identifies potential orphaned record patterns
The agent provides concrete fix recommendations with code
